items.description:
recolors & matching heat bow piece = https://www.roblox.com/communities/14477611/Laveys-Couture#!/about & fav / join group for more

This ultra-kawaii layered piece features 3 delicate pearl chains, a shiny metal chain, and an adorable mix of heart, ribbon, and charm accents. The star of the show?
